data.title: payabl. Launches Tap to Pay, Helping More Merchants Accept Payments on the Move
data.description: Payabl., a top European fintech company, has introduced Tap to Pay, a new feature that enables businesses to accept contactless card payments using their smartphones, eliminating the need for separate card terminals. With this SoftPOS solution, payabl. merchants can transform their NFC-enabled Android phones into secure payment terminals. Aimed at micro and SME enterprises, this innovation allows merchants to quickly start receiving payments through their current mobile devices.

data.title: IOWN Global Forum to Host Global Debate in Australia on Tomorrow’s Networks
data.description: In Sydney, the IOWN Global Forum is organizing FUTURES Sydney 2026 on April 16 to discuss communication networks for scaling AI. The event, held in a major tech and innovation hub in the Southern Hemisphere, will explore advancements in optical and photonics-driven network infrastructure. This international seminar aims to address the requirements for delivering AI on a large scale. The event is open to the public and free to attend.

data.title: Clarity AI Partners with RiskThinking.ai to Deliver Market-Leading Physical Risk and Asset-Level Intelligence
data.description: In New York, Clarity AI, a prominent global technology platform specializing in extra-financial intelligence, has revealed a key partnership with RiskThinking.ai. The latter is a reputable provider of detailed physical climate risk modeling at the asset level. Through this collaboration, Clarity AI will incorporate RiskThinking.ai's intricate asset-level data and advanced physical risk modeling into its acclaimed platform. This will enhance the platform's capabilities, including insights and native AI functions. This move aims to offer financial institutions and corporations unparalleled access to cutting-edge solutions in managing physical climate risks.

data.title: GitHub Copilot can now directly edit pull requests when @mentioned, addressing reviews and tests without new PRs. #GitHub #Copilot #coding
data.description: The coding agent Copilot on GitHub now has the capability to make changes to existing pull requests once it is mentioned. It can fix tests and respond to code reviews without the need for creating new pull requests. This update aims to streamline the coding process and enhance efficiency for developers.

data.title: dynaCERT Announces Leadership Transition as Company Advances Global Commercial Expansion
data.description: In Toronto, a company named dynaCERT Inc. (TSX: DYA) (OTCQB: DYFSF) (FRA: DMJ) has revealed plans for a leadership transition and updated progress on its worldwide commercial endeavors. The Board of Directors is considering Kevin Unrath, the current Chief Operating Officer, for the role of Chief Executive Officer. This move signals dynaCERT's growing emphasis on operational efficiency, commercial expansion, and revenue generation.

data.title: Aegon nominates Marco Keim to succeed Lard Friese on the Supervisory Board of a.s.r.
data.description: Schiphol, March 25, 2026 - Aegon has chosen Marco Keim, currently CEO of their International division and a part of the Executive Committee, to take over as a non-independent member of the Supervisory Board of Dutch insurer a.s.r., in which Aegon holds a significant stake of around 24%. This decision comes after Aegon's declaration on December 10, 2025, that Lard Friese would resign as a non-independent member of a.s.r.'s Supervisory Board to concentrate on relocating Aegon's headquarters and legal seat to the United States.

data.title: In 1988, an Iranian mine hit a U.S. warship. President Trump considers providing escorts for tankers after a similar incident.
data.description: President Trump recently proposed offering escorts for stranded tankers. This suggestion comes after a U.S. frigate in the Persian Gulf was hit by a mine, highlighting the dangers of such a plan.

data.title: Travelers face long TSA lines, expensive tickets, and safety fears after a fatal crash at LaGuardia. Approximately 100 characters.
data.description: Passengers are facing extensive wait times at security checkpoints, as well as exorbitant ticket prices, and heightened concerns about safety following a fatal accident at LaGuardia Airport.

data.title: BNB holders earned 177% returns via Binance Rewards in 15 months without active trading - from Jan 2024 to Q1 2025.
data.description: Data from Binance indicates that holders of BNB have been able to generate a return on investment of 177% between January 2024 and the first quarter of 2025 by utilizing Launchpool, participating in airdrops, and benefiting from price increases. This impressive ROI was achieved without the need for active trading.
